game_meta.name: Call of Duty
game_meta.tagline: FPS franchise — Warzone BR, Resurgence, 6v6 multiplayer (Hardpoint, Domination, Search & Destroy).

sides.attack: Pushing objectives / contesting Hardpoints / capturing Domination flags
sides.defense: Holding objectives / defending Hardpoints / defending flags

game_meta.round_economy: MP modes: no economy. Killstreaks earned by kill streaks. BR: loot economy with cash + loadout drops.
game_meta.round_format: Hardpoint: Score limit (250). Domination: First to score limit (200). S&D: First to 4 round wins. BR: Last squad standing.
key_mechanics: Killstreaks: UAV (4 kills), Counter-UAV (5), Cluster Strike (7), Cruise Missile (8), Precision Airstrike (9), VTOL (12), Chopper Gunner (16)
Loadouts: Custom class with primary + secondary + perks + tactical/lethal grenades + field upgrade
Perks: Tier 1 (Scavenger, Battle Hardened, Cold-Blooded), Tier 2 (Tracker, Hardline), Tier 3 (Tempered, Ghost)
Tactical equipment: Stun, Flash, Smoke, Decoy, Snapshot, Stim
Lethal: Frag, Semtex, Throwing Knife, Thermite, C4, Drill Charge
Spawn flips: in MP, killing too many enemies in one direction flips their spawn
Recoil patterns: each weapon has unique pattern, attachments reduce recoil
Movement: tactical sprint (limited burst), slide-jump, dolphin dive, mantling
match_types: Multiplayer 6v6: Team Deathmatch, Hardpoint, Domination, Search & Destroy, Control, Kill Confirmed
Warzone BR: 100+ players, 4-player squads, ring closing, loadout drops
Resurgence: Smaller map BR with respawn timers
Gulag: 1v1 respawn arena after first death

sites.name: Prison Block
sites.strategy: Prison Block hot drop. Tower for vertical, Yard exposed.

sites.name: Security Area
sites.strategy: Security adjacent to Prison. Rooftop entry from adjacent buildings.

sites.name: Headquarters
sites.strategy: HQ for mid-game loot. Rooftop for vertical.

sites.name: Industry
sites.strategy: Industry edge POI for safer loot.

sites.name: Downtown
sites.strategy: Hot drop — high-tier loot, very contested.

sites.name: Superstore
sites.strategy: Tier-3 loot inside. Iconic Warzone POI.

sites.name: Red Spawn
sites.strategy: Iconic 24/7 chaos map. Spawn-flip every 5 seconds. Fast SMG kills.

sites.name: Blue Spawn
sites.strategy: Mirror Red Spawn. Spawn-flip aggressive play.

sites.name: Yacht Stern
sites.strategy: Iconic Hardpoint zone. Back of yacht.

sites.name: Main Floor
sites.strategy: 1v1 ground engagement. Pistol / SMG. Reaction + audio.

sites.name: Catwalk
sites.strategy: Elevated flank route. Drop on enemy below.

AR Anchor.description: Mid-range AR for sustained damage. Anchors Hardpoint or holds defensive angles.
AR Anchor.loadout: M4 / AK-74 / Kilo / Cold War AK + Frag Grenade + Stim + Trophy System
common_mistakes: Single-shot tap at close range (lose to SMG)
Holding same angle past first kill
ADS scope wasted at close range
AR Anchor.ideal_use: Mid-range Hardpoint / Domination flag hold. Frag grenade for chip. Trophy System for grenade denial.

SMG Rusher.description: Close-range high-rate-of-fire SMG for entry frags and aggressive pushes.
SMG Rusher.loadout: MP5 / MX9 / Vector / Cold War MP5 + Stun + Throwing Knife
common_mistakes: Pushing without flash / stun for entry
Engaging mid-range with SMG (loses to AR)
SMG Rusher.ideal_use: Aggressive entry with Stun + Flash chain. Throwing Knife for chip damage. Dead Silence for silent footsteps.

Sniper / Marksman.description: Long-range one-shot or fast scoping for picks. Holds elevated angles.
Sniper / Marksman.loadout: Kar98 / SP-R 208 / SVD + Sniper Rifle Pistol Loadout
common_mistakes: Holding same angle past first kill
Wasting bullets on body (1-shot only on headshot)
Sniper / Marksman.ideal_use: Long-range pick, reposition after first kill, hold elevated angle. Quick-scope for mid-range trades.

Support / Tactical.description: Player running Recon Drone, Trophy System, Smoke for team utility.
Support / Tactical.loadout: AR + Smoke + Trophy System + Recon Drone
Support / Tactical.ideal_use: Recon Drone for site info, Trophy for grenade denial, Smoke for cover push.

silver: Class loadout for one weapon (not range-flexible)
Random utility usage (Stun on empty angle)
Aggressive solo plays without team trade
Buy / loot decision random in BR
gold: Killstreak combo (UAV → Counter-UAV → Cluster Strike) timing off
Loadout drop timing off in BR
platinum: Aggressive Sniper holds without escape plan
Buy / loot decision based on round count
diamond: Pro-tier reads on enemy comp — predictable on own
Util discipline gaps — 1 wasted grenade per round
Off-angle pre-aim not adjusted per round
iridescent_top250: Pro-tier reads on enemy comp on every round
Util tracking gaps — 1 grenade untracked per round

positioning: Is the player crosshair pre-aimed at head level?
Is the player in trade position with teammate?
Is the player off-angle or on common angle?
Is the player exposed to multiple sightlines?
Did the player commit to the Hardpoint hold or hesitate?
Is the player using cover (corner, lift, building) or in open?
Did the player track spawn flips after kills?
crosshair: Is the crosshair at head level?
Is the player tracking on hitscan?
Is the player using the right weapon for the engagement range?
Is the recoil pattern being pulled correctly?
Is the player ADS for mid-range or hipfire for close?
Is the player landing 1-tap headshots with Sniper?
Is the player counter-strafing before shooting?
utility: Did the player use grenades proactively?
Did the player use field upgrade (Trophy, Recon Drone) at the right time?
Was the team coordinated on killstreak combo?
Did the player save grenades for the post-kill follow-up?
Was the team coordinated on smoke cover push?
Did the player track enemy killstreaks (UAV, Counter-UAV)?
decisions: Did the player commit to the Hardpoint hold or hesitate?
Did the player rotate when called?
Did the player engage 1v2+ without team backup?
Did the player save weapon on knock (BR)?
Did the player commit to the flag grab or hesitate?
Did the player coordinate spawn flip?
Did the player call out enemy killstreak in use?
In BR: did the player track ring damage and rotate in time?

vocabulary: Hardpoint: Hold-the-zone mode, 60s timer per zone.
Domination: Cap 3 flags, score over time.
S&D / Search and Destroy: Round-based, plant bomb or kill all.
Killstreak: Reward for kill streak — UAV, Cluster, VTOL, etc.
UAV: Mini-map reveal of enemies (4 kills).
Counter-UAV: Block enemy minimap (5 kills).
Cluster Strike: Area damage strike (7 kills).
Cruise Missile: Player-piloted missile (8 kills).
Precision Airstrike: Area damage strike (9 kills).
VTOL: Hovering attack aircraft (12 kills).
Chopper Gunner: Player-piloted attack helicopter (16 kills).
Perks: Tier 1/2/3 passive effects.
Scavenger: Refills ammo from kills (Tier 1).
Battle Hardened: Reduces tactical effect (Tier 1).
Cold-Blooded: Hides from UAV / Recon (Tier 1).
Tracker: See enemy footprints (Tier 2).
Hardline: Killstreaks 1 kill cheaper (Tier 2).
Ghost: Hidden from UAV (Tier 3).
Tempered: 2-hit kill resistance (Tier 3).
Stun: Tactical grenade — slows + blurs.
Flash: Tactical grenade — blinds + concuss.
Smoke: Tactical grenade — area vision block.
Decoy: Tactical grenade — fake gunfire.
Snapshot: Tactical grenade — see enemies through walls.
Stim: Tactical — instant heal.
Frag: Lethal grenade — explosive.
Semtex: Sticky grenade.
Throwing Knife: Lethal — instant kill on direct.
Thermite: Sticky fire grenade — sticks to surface.
C4: Placeable explosive.
Drill Charge: Wall-pierce explosive.
Trophy System: Auto-destroys incoming grenades (2 use).
Recon Drone: Scout drone for site intel.
Tactical Sprint: Limited fast sprint (3-5s).
Slide-jump: Slide + jump for movement.
Dolphin Dive: Diving prone for cover.
Mantling: Climbing onto edges.
Loadout Drop: BR — drops your custom class kit.
Plate / Armor Plate: BR — adds 50 HP buffer (max 3 plates = 150 HP).
Buy Station: BR — buy killstreaks / equipment with cash.
Gulag: 1v1 respawn after first BR death.
Specialist Box: Equipment box for loot.
Cash: BR currency.
Loot: BR weapons / attachments.
Resurgence: Smaller-map BR with respawn timers.
Ring / Storm: BR closing zone — damage when outside.
Spawn flip: Forcing enemy spawn in different direction.
Spawn cycle: Tracking respawn timing.
Cross-map shot: Long-range kill from one side to another.
Quick-scope: Fast ADS + shot with Sniper.
Tap-fire: Single shot at distance for accuracy.
ADS: Aim Down Sights.
Hip-fire: Shooting without ADS.
Recoil pattern: Each weapon's unique pattern.
